title: In Aid of The Moving Menagerie Creature Show
summary: Four creatures from the Moving Menagerie have escaped into the city — an Owlbear rampaging through the market district, a Blue Dragon Wyrmling loose on the rooftops, and a pack of Shadow Mastiffs in the darker streets. The Menagerie departs soon.
expires: Contract lapses when the Menagerie leaves Dorel

title: In Service of His Grace Lord Tersh
summary: Lord Tersh requests discreet guild presence at his Manor Fundraiser for the Dorel Artificer Guild. The guild has been specifically asked for. Conduct and discretion are expected throughout.
reward: 15sp per member, plus Artificer Vouchers valued at 10gp each
expires: The Gala is a fixed date

title: Care of The Family Pintfoot
summary: A funeral urn belonging to the Pintfoot family has vanished from the Dorel Delivery Company. The company has since turned unresponsive. A thorough investigation report is required; physical recovery is welcomed but not required.
completion: Full investigation report submitted to Garfield Pintfoot.
reward: 5gp in gemstones, with additional payment for physical recovery

title: Care of The House Ranstok
summary: A Ranstok family heirloom was left in the vault of their recently sold manor, now occupied by the Hamilton family. The new owners claim all possessions left at handover. A discreet extraction is required. Damage to the heirloom voids the contract.
reward: 15gp if retrieved without alerting the household

title: In Aid of the Corborough Fishing Collective
summary: The village of Corborough has seen its nets come up empty for three weeks running. The fishermen report something large moving in the shallows at night — felt more than seen. Trade with Dorel is already affected. The Collective asks for the matter to be investigated and resolved before the season is lost.
completion: The threat to Corborough's fishing grounds is identified and dealt with.
reward: 40gp, plus a standing arrangement for discounted passage along the coastal route
expires: Contract lapses at the close of the fishing season

title: The Securing of the Rustborough Northern Pass
summary: The road connecting Rustborough to the northern trade routes has been effectively closed. A company of mercenaries — origin unknown — has established a toll post at the pass. No violence has yet been reported, but no goods have moved in a fortnight. The Rustborough council has petitioned the House to resolve the blockade.
completion: The pass is cleared and the road declared open by the Rustborough council's representative.
reward: 65gp, split on confirmation of safe passage

title: In Furtherance of the Manawell Cartographic Survey
summary: A researcher based in Manawell requires updated survey maps of the terrain between Dorel and Hamrun. Previous survey teams have returned incomplete work. The assignment is to travel the route, document key landmarks, and deliver the completed charts to the researcher's correspondent in Dorel. No unusual hazards are anticipated, though the wooded stretches near Hamrun have seen irregular druid activity.
completion: Completed survey charts delivered to the researcher's correspondent in Dorel.
reward: 35gp on delivery, plus expenses for the road

title: In Response to the Gruntenwald Forge Sabotage
summary: Three of Gruntenwald's smithies have been struck by what the masters describe as deliberate interference — tools displaced, furnaces tampered with, one apprentice injured. The culprit has not been identified. Local suspicion is running hot and the masters are concerned the situation will escalate before it is resolved. A party is required to investigate and bring a definitive answer before the forge district takes matters into its own hands.
completion: The responsible party identified and turned over, or otherwise removed from the situation.
reward: 50gp, with a further 15gp if the findings can be fully evidenced
expires: Contract lapses if violence breaks out among the forge district before resolution

title: In Service of the Tamea Municipal Authority
summary: A significant sum in public funds — collected for the expansion of Tamea's artificer quarter — has gone missing from the municipal vault. The Authority has ruled out external breach. The inquiry is therefore an internal one, requiring discretion above all else. A party from outside the city is considered preferable precisely because they carry no existing alliances within Tamea. Full cooperation from the Authority's senior staff has been pledged.
completion: The missing funds are accounted for and the responsible party identified to the Authority's satisfaction.
reward: 120gp, plus formal commendation from the Tamea Municipal Authority

title: In Aid of Tovel — the Collapsed Waystation
summary: The only waystation on the road between Tovel and Stormwell has collapsed into a sinkhole, stranding a group of travellers and cutting off the route for supply wagons. A rescue and recovery operation is needed — the travellers must be extracted, and a temporary route assessment completed so that Stormwell's harbour district can continue receiving overland cargo. The sinkhole's cause is not yet known.
completion: All stranded travellers safely extracted and a viable alternative route confirmed in writing.
reward: 90gp, with an additional 20gp if the sinkhole's cause is determined and documented
expires: Contract lapses if the stranded travellers are not reached within seven days of posting

title: On Behalf of the Dorel Trade Council — the Crestfall Tariff Dispute
summary: Crestfall has begun levying an unofficial tariff on goods passing through its western roads — roads the Trade Council maintains were settled as open passage by longstanding agreement. Diplomatic correspondence has gone unanswered. The Council requires a party to travel to Crestfall, meet with whoever is currently enforcing the tariff, and achieve a resolution acceptable to both parties. The House has been entrusted to represent the Council's interests without incident.
completion: A written agreement restoring unimpeded trade passage is returned to the Dorel Trade Council.
reward: 150gp on presentation of the signed agreement

title: The Matter of the Phasing Tower
summary: A tower on the outskirts of Dorel — long considered derelict and sealed — has begun showing light in its upper windows. No one is recorded as having entered. No one is recorded as having left. Three separate passersby have reported hearing sounds that they cannot agree on. The House has received no formal contract from a client. This posting originates from the guild itself. Interested parties should be prepared for the scope of this assignment to be undefined at the point of entry.
completion: A complete account of what the tower contains is delivered to the House, along with resolution of whatever threat — if any — is present.
reward: Variable, assessed by the House on return
